name: Flightradar24
description: Transport OSINT. OSINT tool from the OSINT Newsletter tools library (https://tools.osintnewsletter.com/). Tool: https://tools.osintnewsletter.com/osint-tools/flightradar24. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #289 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Flightradar24 output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved Flightradar24 output file to parse instead of running it live.
